title: Plan-review and coverage-preview gate presets
description:
Define a `plan-review` preset (agent gate on the planning node) and a `coverage-preview` preset (deterministic gate on the breakdown node running scoped validation), plus the preview coverage rule that omits child-state.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Applying `plan-review` attaches an agent review gate to a planning node.
- [ ] Applying `coverage-preview` attaches a gate whose checker runs scoped validation for the container resolved from the breakdown node.
- [ ] The preview coverage rule omits `child-state` (any state) while the closure rule requires done.
